title: Streaming Sitemap XML, Index Graphs, and Admission Bounds · Mastery Check
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss Go decisions for streaming sitemap xml, index graphs, and admission bounds and accepts only compile and runtime changed-case evidence, explicit non-claims, and named network, DNS, parser, browser, accessibility, security, load, legal-review, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for streaming bounded sitemap graph. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: Use encoding/xml tokens to validate namespace, root, UTF-8, loc, escaping, depth, counts, bytes, and trailing content without whole-tree allocation.
Model sitemap indexes as a bounded directed graph with unique identities, depth limits, cycle detection, and stable traversal.
Apply protocol location rules plus authorization, URL, robots, redirect, DNS, and SSRF policy to every sitemap and page entry.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Sitemap Provenance
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Go team handles case 8057 during a malformed HTML and parser differential clinic. Build deterministic Go evidence to stream bounded sitemap XML and index graphs through host, scope, hint, and provenance admission; every URL, body, tree, record, frontier transition, and report row retains causal identity; then change one content version, metadata, accessibility, resource, browser-service, or report condition without overclaiming. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Retain source digest, index chain, entry position, raw loc, resolved key, decision, and rejection cause.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Sitemap Provenance.
